scripts.build: corepack pnpm run compile && node dist/build.js
scripts.build:sync: corepack pnpm run compile && node dist/build.js --sync
scripts.build:all: corepack pnpm run compile && node dist/build.js --all
scripts.watch: corepack pnpm run compile && node dist/dev-watch.js
scripts.watch:log: corepack pnpm run compile && node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('.logs',{recursive:true})" && node dist/dev-watch.js > .logs/dev-watch.log 2> .logs/dev-watch.err.log
